mechanics.excerpt: COMBAT may add his skill bonus to the die roll_ this check is failed_ the character is knocked prone. Critlcal Wound Wound Value: Critical Wounds are very dangerous and life-threatening but will not kill character as quickly as Deadly Wounds fact; very strong (or strong-willed} characters can even continue to fight (or, if they are smart; rush to hospital) while suffering Critical Wound Examples include severed limbs, serious dam age t0 major organs and arterial bleeding: Atter taking Critical Wound character is stunned and must make an immediate Knockout Check (see 116).
